title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks a mixed-provider workflow pairing Claude Opus with Kimi K2.6 for coding tasks. Using the Archon framework, he tests four configurations varying which model handles planning versus implementation against real GitHub issues, then evaluates output quality across seven dimensions.
